author: Paul Mina
title: Does not correct volume for replay gain
content: I have a number of recordings that all play back at different volumes. All my audio has replay gain tags so in other audio players everthing plays at the right volume. I have to give you one star as it is very dangerous when I'm driving and all of a sudden the volume is on full blast giving me a fright in traffic. This is unacceptable!!! Once you fix this I will update this review, untill then I need to find something else.
